name: SD Equity Partners: San Diego Hard Money Lenders
description_short: SD Equity Partners is a San Diego-based hard money lender specializing in fix-and-flip loans with 100% purchase price financing and no monthly payments during the rehab period.
description_long:
SD Equity Partners is a family-owned hard money lending company founded by Evan and Liila Harris of Poway, California. The owners transitioned from actively flipping properties themselves to the financing side of the business after starting a family. Their direct experience as real estate investors informs their lending approach and loan product design. The company operates in San Diego, Orange, Los Angeles, and Phoenix counties, serving both borrowers and investors in the real estate investment space.

SD Equity Partners offers hard money loans primarily designed for fix-and-flip projects and property rehabilitation. Their signature loan product provides 100% financing of the purchase price, eliminating the need for borrowers to front a down payment. The loans carry no monthly payments during the project period, allowing investors to preserve capital for rehabilitation costs and subcontractor payments. The company also operates an investment program where individuals, partnerships, and corporations can fund loans in exchange for higher returns secured by real estate trust deeds. Investors can utilize 401k or IRA funds if authorized by their specific fund structure.

SD Equity Partners distinguishes itself through its owners' direct experience in the flipping business, fast turnaround times (as few as 7 days from application to funding), and emphasis on transparency and flexibility. The company positions itself as smaller and more nimble than larger lenders while maintaining sufficient resources to handle complex deals. They evaluate borrowers on deal quality, experience, resources, and loan application criteria rather than relying solely on credit scores or traditional banking metrics. The testimonial from Brian Mollo of Trusted House Buyers characterizes them as "big enough to handle anything" while remaining "small enough to be nimble, always available, and perform at a very higher standard."

SD Equity Partners is legitimately focused on a niche market—real estate investors and fix-and-flip specialists—rather than serving as a general business lender. Borrowers should understand that hard money loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional financing and are secured by real estate. The company's emphasis on "no monthly payments" specifically refers to the project period; loans must ultimately be repaid, typically when the property is sold or refinanced. This is appropriate for experienced investors but not suitable for those seeking conventional business financing or personal loans.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 100% purchase price financing eliminates down payment requirements, freeing capital for rehabilitation costs
Fast funding timeline: as few as 7 days from application to loan delivery
No monthly payments during project period allows flexible cash flow for subcontractor and rehab expenses
Owners have direct personal experience as property flippers, informing loan program design
Operates in multiple markets (San Diego, Orange, LA, and Phoenix counties) with established track record
Investment program allows non-accredited investors to earn higher returns with real estate collateral backing
Accepts alternative funding sources including 401k and IRA funds for qualified investors
Transparent, straightforward evaluation process based on deal quality and experience rather than credit-focused criteria
cons: Hard money loans carry higher interest rates than traditional bank financing, increasing project costs
Limited to real estate investors and fix-and-flip specialists; not suitable for general business financing needs
Specific interest rates, term lengths, and loan conditions are not disclosed on the website
Geographic limitation to Western states (California and Arizona) excludes borrowers in other regions
Loans are ultimately due upon sale or refinance, requiring proven exit strategy; not suitable for long-term financing
best_for: Real estate investors and house flippers seeking quick acquisition financing without down payment requirements
Property rehabilitation specialists who need capital preservation for construction and subcontractor costs
Individual and institutional investors seeking higher returns on capital secured by real estate trust deeds
Experienced real estate professionals with documented flipping experience and proven deal sourcing ability
diagnosis: SD Equity Partners is best for experienced real estate investors and fix-and-flip professionals who need fast, flexible acquisition financing without down payment requirements and can exit through property sale or refinance. The critical caveat is that hard money loans are significantly more expensive than traditional financing and are exclusively for real estate deals, not general business needs; borrowers must have a clear exit strategy and proven ability to execute profitable projects.
services: Fix and flip loans with 100% purchase price financing
Property rehabilitation financing for rehab projects
House flipping loans with no monthly payments during project period
Hard money lending for real estate acquisitions in San Diego, Orange, Los Angeles, and Phoenix counties
Private money lending with flexible terms and fast funding decisions
Real estate investment opportunities with returns secured by trust deeds
Investment program for individuals, partnerships, and corporations
401k and IRA-qualified funding for eligible self-directed retirement accounts
Lender investment portal and investor relations
Recently funded project portfolio and case studies
Borrower tools and resources for real estate investors
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
